title: Surface source in bee status + share the detector with onboard report (DIST-04)
action: Wire the shared classifier (DIST-04, D1/D3). bee.mjs buildStatus (:223): import classifySource from ./lib/source-identity.mjs and add a report-only field source:{kind,root} using hiveDir = the running launcher's bee-hive... NOTE bee.mjs runs from .bee/bin, so classify the SOURCE the host would onboard from — resolve the launcher/source dir appropriately (validating confirms which dir bee status should classify). Mirror to .bee/bin/bee.mjs. onboard_bee.mjs: call the SAME classifySource and include kind in its report payload — its identityOk/selfOnboard DECISION flow UNCHANGED (wrap not replace). Add a status test asserting source.kind renders and existing onboarding fields are unchanged.

truths: bee status output carries a report-only source:{kind,root} from the shared classifier
onboard report includes the same classified kind (shared detector, DIST-04) and its identityOk/selfOnboard decisions are byte-identical before/after (no regression)
source field is additive: existing status fields unchanged; drift = a boolean still present
templates/bee.mjs == .bee/bin/bee.mjs byte-identical; full verify chain green
prohibitions: do NOT change onboarding's source-resolution decisions (report/corroborate only)
do not reshape existing status fields

trace.outcome: bee status gained a report-only source:{kind,root} field (classifies the repo's bee-hive via the shared classifySource — source_checkout for beegog), and onboard's plan payload carries the same classified kind (DIST-04 shared detector). Onboarding's identityOk/selfOnboard DECISION flow unchanged (wrap-not-replace, test_onboard_bee 0 failures). Additive: existing status fields intact. Full 13-suite green.
trace.verify_output: bee status live shows source:{kind:source_checkout,root:...} for beegog; onboard plan payload source=source_checkout (shared detector); test_bee_cli source-field test green; test_onboard_bee 0 failures (identityOk decisions unchanged); mirror 16 files; full 13-suite green
